entities.name: Goals
entities.context: Data class or object holding fitness targets including weekly_days and weekly_minutes thresholds

entities.name: matplotlib
entities.context: Python plotting library used to generate workout visualization charts (plt.bar, plt.plot, plt.savefig)

entities.name: weekly_days chart
entities.context: Bar chart visualization showing workout days per week, color-coded green (goal met) or red (goal missed)

entities.name: rolling_7d chart
entities.context: Line chart visualization showing rolling 7-day workout minutes against a weekly minutes goal

entities.name: Fitness Tracking System
entities.context: Broader system that tracks workout frequency (days) and volume (minutes) against configurable goals

relationships.context: Uses goals.weekly_days to set the goal line and color-code bars green/red based on whether the target was met
Uses goals.weekly_minutes to draw the weekly goal threshold line on the rolling chart
Built with matplotlib bar charts, saved as weekly_days.png
Built with matplotlib line plots for rolling 7-day trend
Goals object parameterizes the entire tracking system with weekly_days and weekly_minutes targets
Weekly days chart is one output visualization of the fitness tracking system
Rolling 7-day chart is another output visualization of the fitness tracking system
